activities.assay_description: Compound was evaluated for the association constant to an isolated site of DNA

Compound was evaluated for 50% inhibition of DNA synthesis in Ehrlich ascites tumor cells by irradiation (365 nM) at 1.9 x 10e -5M incubated with [3H]thymidine at 37 degree C (p 0.05)
